en.부재료 및 약재: Dandelion root (50g), Black soybeans (30g), Schisandra berries (20g), Black sesame seeds (20g), Ginger (20g)
en.주요 효능: Promotes blood circulation and vitality, prevents aging, and improves hair quality. Also helps alleviate symptoms of fatigue, dry eyes, and digestive issues.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Neutral or slightly warm in nature, with sweet and bitter flavors. Effects: Balances the body's energy, harmonizes the digestive system, and regulates blood circulation.
en.조리 방법 요약: Soak rice, black soybeans, Schisandra berries, and ginger in water. Combine cooked dandelion root and ginger to create a nourishing bowl.
en.ancient_context: This traditional recipe is based on the principles of balancing the body's energy and promoting overall well-being through a harmonious blend of ingredients.

en.부재료 및 약재: Ginseng (20g), Shrimp (50g), Onion, Garlic, White Wine, Sour Cream, Olive Oil
en.주요 효능: Promotes blood circulation and overall well-being, enhancing vitality and preventing aging. Also beneficial for children's growth and development, as well as postpartum recovery.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Warm (溫性), Sweet (甘味), Salty (鹹味), Bitter (辛味). Effects: Blood-balancing, Nerve-calming.
en.조리 방법 요약: Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions. In a pan, sauté garlic and onion in olive oil, then add red dates, shrimp, and white wine. Simmer until the ingredients are well combined, then mix in cooked ginseng and sour cream.
en.ancient_context: This traditional K-Food recipe is designed to harmonize the properties of ingredients, enhance their synergistic effects, and prevent disharmony. It embodies the principles of balance and vitality in Korean wellness cuisine.

en.요리명: Red Bean Noodles with Yam and Poria
en.부재료 및 약재: Maga-Ru (10g), Bok-Yeong-Ga-Ru (10g), Salt, Sugar
en.주요 효능: Activates bodily fluids to treat edema and stagnation. Balances the heart and removes heat.
en.기미 및 귀경: Ki-Mi: Neutral or Cooling in nature, with sweet and sour tastes. Gui-Kyeong: Heart, Liver, Spleen, and Kidney meridians.
en.조리 방법 요약: Mix Maga-Ru and Bok-Yeong-Ga-Ru into wheat flour to create noodles. Cooked pat is filtered to make a paste, then cooked with noodles until done.
en.ancient_context: Based on traditional dietary therapy theories, this recipe for Ma-Bok Patkal-Guk-Su includes ingredients that promote gut health and vitality, as well as balance and harmony in the body.

en.부재료 및 약재: Ginseng (10g), White Poria (10g), Cnidium (10g), Licorice Root (5g), Date Fruit (10g)
en.주요 효능: Restores digestive balance, alleviates chronic constipation and fatigue, and enhances overall vitality.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Warm, Neutral, Sweet. Directions for use: Before meals, as needed.
en.조리 방법 요약: Steep the Sagunja adaptogenic blend in water. Mix with rice and date fruit to create a soothing porridge.
en.ancient_context: This traditional adaptogenic porridge was consumed as a remedy for digestive issues and fatigue when the body's energy was depleted.

en.부재료 및 약재: Cinnamon Bark (30g), Ginseng (15g), Jujube (20g), Schisandra (15g), Date (30g)
en.주요 효능: This dish helps to fortify the vital energy, regulate body temperature, and strengthen the immune system, alleviating fatigue and stress.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Warm, Sweet, and Bitter. Indications: Menstrual cramps, PMS, and menopausal symptoms.
en.조리 방법 요약: Make a decoction with cinnamon bark. Combine cooked rice with ginseng, jujube, schisandra, and date, then add the cinnamon bark decoction to create a harmonious balance of flavors.
en.ancient_context: This autumn/winter traditional dish is designed to fortify the vital energy and strengthen the skin barrier, helping to regulate body temperature and alleviate fatigue.

en.부재료 및 약재: Mak Mundong (25g), Dong-gu-le (15g), Shiitake Mushroom (30g)
en.주요 효능: Provides vital fluids to the lungs and digestive system, soothing dry coughs, relieving heat, and promoting overall well-being.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: cool, calm, sweet, and slightly bitter. Effects: regulates menstruation, relieves digestive issues, and soothes the mind.
en.조리 방법 요약: Gently simmer Mak Mundong and Dong-gu-le in water. Cook rice and barley with Shiitake mushroom slices, then season with a savory broth.
en.ancient_context: This recipe is an ancient remedy for soothing the lungs and digestive system, promoting balance and harmony.

en.부재료 및 약재: Ginseng (40g), Date (10g), Salt
en.주요 효능: Balances the spleen and lungs, relieves constipation, and soothes joint pain and discomfort.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Neutral with a slightly warm nature, sweet flavor, and bland aftertaste. Effects: Can be used to treat various symptoms such as fatigue, digestive issues, and joint pain.
en.조리 방법 요약: Rinse the Mountain Ginseng beforehand. Cook the rice and ginseng together until the mixture thickens, then add the cooked ginseng and date, and simmer until it reaches the desired consistency.
en.ancient_context: This recipe is a harmonizing dish that strengthens the spleen and lungs, relieves constipation, and soothes joint pain and discomfort.

en.부재료 및 약재: Dried Lotus (20g), Dates (15g), Honey (20g)
en.주요 효능: This recipe promotes relaxation, calms the mind, and soothes respiratory issues. It's beneficial for insomnia, anxiety, and dry cough.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Neutral or Cooling in nature, with a sweet and slightly bitter taste. Effects: Balances the body's energy, harmonizes the spirit, and nourishes the kidneys, liver, and stomach.
en.조리 방법 요약: Soak the dried lotus and rice in water. Add dates and simmer slowly until the porridge is complete. Then, mix in honey to finish.
en.ancient_context: This recipe calms the mind, soothes respiratory issues, and promotes relaxation, making it a natural remedy for insomnia and dry cough.

en.부재료 및 약재: Ginseng (20g), Lotus Seed (30g), Mulberry Leaves (10g), Jujube Fruits (15g), Soy Sauce
en.주요 효능: Balances the body's energy, soothes the digestive system, and treats anxiety and stress.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Warm, Sweet, and Bitter. Effects: Calms the mind, nourishes the spirit, and harmonizes the body.
en.조리 방법 요약: Pork belly is marinated in soy sauce and then sliced into bite-sized pieces. Lotus seed is cooked until tender and its skin removed. All ingredients are combined with rice to make a nourishing porridge.
en.ancient_context: This royal court recipe was enjoyed by the Korean royal family as a nourishing and balancing dish that soothes the body and spirit.

en.부재료 및 약재: Angelica (8g), Rehmannia (12g), Bok Choy, Potato, Garlic, Ginger
en.주요 효능: Promotes blood circulation and boosts vitality, alleviates menstrual cramps, headaches, and body fatigue.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Warm, Spicy, Sweet. Effects: Balances Qi, Harmonizes Body Functions.
en.조리 방법 요약: Combine Angelica and Rehmannia with broth and mix well. Knead the flour with a liquid to form a dough, then add it to the stew when the vegetables are cooked.
en.ancient_context: This traditional recipe is a representative example of a harmonizing and vitality-boosting stew that promotes blood circulation and replenishes the body.

en.주재료: Mandu wrapper (flour, 20g of sweet potato powder), pork (150g)
en.부재료 및 약재: Sweet potato (100g), leek, tofu, soybean sprouts, garlic, ginger
en.주요 효능: This dish helps to harmonize the digestive system and promote balance in the body, which can aid in preventing blood sugar imbalances and inflammation.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: neutral and calming, with a sweet and savory flavor. Effects: beneficial for the spleen, stomach, heart, and small intestine.
en.조리 방법 요약: Mix flour with sweet potato powder to make mandu wrappers. Mix minced pork, sweet potato, leek, tofu, and soybean sprouts to fill the mandu, then steam them until cooked through.
en.ancient_context: This traditional mandu recipe aims to promote digestive health and balance in the body by harmonizing the spleen and preventing blood sugar imbalances.

en.부재료 및 약재: Gogi fruit (30g), Adzuki bean (20g), Jujube (15g)
en.주요 효능: Balances digestive and urinary systems, improves eyesight, relieves joint pain and stiffness, and promotes healthy skin.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Neutral, Sweet. Effects: Kidney-balancing, Liver-calming, Menstrual-regulating.
en.조리 방법 요약: Rinse the gogi fruit lightly. Combine brown rice, white rice, cooked adzuki bean, and add the gogi fruit on top to create a pressure-cooked harmonious dish.
en.ancient_context: This longevity-promoting recipe balances digestive and urinary systems, clarifies eyesight, and harmonizes the waist and knees.

en.부재료 및 약재: Danggui (15g), Oimija Extract, Jatt (5g), Honey
en.주요 효능: This tonic helps to balance blood flow and circulation, promoting vitality and overall well-being. It also supports the body's natural energy and harmony.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Warm, Neutral, Sweet, and Bitter. Effects: Blood circulation, Heart health, Lung function.
en.조리 방법 요약: Mix rice flour with water to form a dough, shape into small balls, and cook in boiling water. Then, soak the cooked balls in cold water. Combine Danggui extract, Oimija extract, and honey to create a harmonious blend.
en.ancient_context: This traditional tonic is designed to nourish women's blood circulation, promote heart health, and support lung function, making it a high-energy and harmonious recipe.

en.부재료 및 약재: Triphala Powder (5g), Black Soybeans (20g), Jujube (10g)
en.주요 효능: Balances and harmonizes blood circulation, prevents micro-bleeding, and aids in wound recovery.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Warm, sweet, and bitter. Effects: Liver, stomach, and large intestine.
en.조리 방법 요약: Mix glutinous rice with cooked rice and soaked black soybeans. Add triphala powder to the porridge and cook until it's smooth and creamy.
en.ancient_context: This traditional blood-balancing porridge helps to eliminate stagnant blood, prevent micro-bleeding, and aid in wound recovery.

en.주재료: White Peony Noodle (200g), Soy Sauce Broth
en.부재료 및 약재: White Peony Root (15g), Licorice Root (5g), Cucumber, Ginger Juice, Wasabi, Ginkgo Powder
en.주요 효능: Relaxes the digestive system and alleviates muscle cramps, pain (abdominal pain, stomach discomfort) and internal heat.
en.기미 및 귀경: Taste: slightly cool, sour, and sweet. Texture: smooth and soothing.
en.조리 방법 요약: Simmer White Peony Root and Licorice Root in a soy sauce broth. Cook the White Peony Noodle, then serve it with the savory broth and garnish with cucumber slices.
en.ancient_context: This traditional nourishing noodle soup harmonizes digestive energy, alleviates abdominal cramps and discomfort, and cools the body.

en.부재료 및 약재: Ginseng (20g), Jujube (10g), Salt
en.주요 효능: Supports bone and joint health, promotes brain function, and prevents constipation caused by dryness.
en.기미 및 귀경: Taste: Neutral, slightly bitter, and sweet. Effect: Balances the body's energy, nourishes the mind, and soothes the spirit.
en.조리 방법 요약: Extract a decoction from ginseng. Grind rice and black sesame in a blender, then add the decoction and simmer slowly until cooked.
en.ancient_context: This longevity-promoting porridge supports bone health, nourishes the digestive system, and prevents aging.

en.부재료 및 약재: Gogiya (25g), Daecheong (15g)
en.주요 효능: Regulates fluid balance, replenishes vital energy, and helps to prevent fatigue and puffiness.
en.기미 및 귀경: Ki: harmonious, sweet. Gui: calm, intelligent, and wise.
en.조리 방법 요약: Pat is first cooked until slightly soft, then mixed with gogiya, daecheong, and served over rice to create a nourishing and revitalizing dish.
en.ancient_context: This traditional recipe is based on the principles of traditional medicine and emphasizes the benefits of gogiya and pat in promoting digestive health and overall well-being.

en.부재료 및 약재: Yeonahnok (15g), White Ginseng (10g), Honey
en.주요 효능: Balances the heart and kidneys, alleviates insomnia, palpitations, and promotes healthy hair and gut function.
en.기미 및 귀경: Ki: Neutral and warm, sweet in flavor. Gui: Heart, spirit, and vital energy.
en.조리 방법 요약: Grind black sesame and glutinous rice together. Soak the ingredients in a decoction made with Yeonahnok, then simmer slowly and finish with honey and white ginseng.
en.ancient_context: Based on traditional dietary therapy theories, this recipe for Black Sesame Anshinjuk includes ingredients that promote gut health and vitality, as well as alleviate symptoms of insomnia and palpitations.

en.부재료 및 약재: Dried ginseng powder (20g), Anchovy, Dried seaweed, Potato, Pumpkin, Parsley
en.주요 효능: This dish helps to promote urination and bowel movement while maintaining digestive health and preventing constipation.
en.기미 및 귀경: Taste: Plain, Mild, Sweet. Effect: Balances the body's energy, harmonizes the stomach, and soothes the mind.
en.조리 방법 요약: Mix millet flour, wheat flour, and dried ginseng powder to form a dough. Add anchovy, dried seaweed, vegetables, and rice cake to a broth made with the ingredients and simmer.
en.ancient_context: This traditional recipe is based on the principles of traditional medicine, emphasizing the protective effects of the ingredients on the digestive system and their ability to promote vitality.

en.부재료 및 약재: White Poria (15g), Licorice Root (5g), Ginger Powder (2g), Date (10g)
en.주요 효능: This dish helps to eliminate chronic fatigue and promote digestive efficiency, alleviating symptoms of chronic indigestion and bloating.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Warm, Sweet, and Bitter. Effects: Soothing the stomach, promoting digestion, and relieving abdominal discomfort.
en.조리 방법 요약: Boil sweet potatoes and shape into small balls. Mix white poria and licorice root with rice to make a porridge, then add ginger powder and sweet potato balls to create a balanced dish.
en.ancient_context: This traditional recipe is based on the principles of traditional medicine and emphasizes the harmonizing effects of the ingredients to promote digestive health and overall well-being.

en.주재료: Rice (300g), assorted mountain herbs (Gosari, Doraji, Cusnae)
en.부재료 및 약재: Mountain Ginseng (15g), Angelica (5g), Herbal Chili Paste, Sesame Oil
en.주요 효능: Promotes digestion and absorption of nutrients, regulates blood circulation, and improves overall vitality.
en.기미 및 귀경: Taste: warm and soothing, with a hint of sweetness. Effect: harmonizes the body's energy, balances yin and yang, and nourishes the spirit.
en.조리 방법 요약: Steep mountain ginseng in hot water to extract its essence, then mix it with herbal chili paste. Serve with rice, assorted mountain herbs, mountain ginseng chili paste, and sesame oil for a harmonious and balanced meal.
en.ancient_context: This traditional recipe is based on the principles of traditional medicine, emphasizing the digestive benefits and vitality-boosting properties of mountain ginseng and other botanical actives.

en.주재료: Rice (300g), Ginseng (50g, of the species Panax ginseng)
en.부재료 및 약재: Honey (10g), Jujube (15g), Shiitake Mushroom (30g)
en.주요 효능: This dish helps to detoxify the body, relieve joint inflammation, and improve overall vitality by promoting balance and harmony.
en.기미 및 귀경: Taste: slightly sweet and neutral, with a hint of bitterness. Effects: suitable for those who are feeling fatigued or experiencing digestive issues. Suitable for all ages and genders.
en.조리 방법 요약: Soak the ginseng in water overnight. Combine rice, ginseng, shiitake mushroom, jujube, and honey in a pot to create a nourishing porridge.
en.ancient_context: This traditional recipe is based on the principles of traditional medicine and emphasizes the importance of balancing yin and yang energies to promote overall well-being.

en.부재료 및 약재: Ginseng (Ma, 50g), White Poria (10g), Ginseng (5g), Salt
en.주요 효능: This dish helps to regulate chronic diarrhea and digestive issues, promoting a healthy gut and overall well-being.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Neutral with slightly warm and sweet flavors. Effects: Supports digestion, relieves stress, and promotes vitality.
en.조리 방법 요약: Boil the rice and mix it with a decoction of White Poria and Ginseng. Add the ginseng extract to the mixture and simmer together to create the stew.
en.ancient_context: This traditional recipe is based on the principles of traditional medicine and emphasizes the gut-healing properties and vitality-boosting effects of the ingredients used in Mountain Harmony Stew.

en.주재료: Mandu wrapper (wheat flour, rice flour), finely chopped pork (150g)
en.부재료 및 약재: Macmun-dong (15g), Doraji (20g), Pa, Garlic, Ginger juice, Soy sauce
en.주요 효능: Exceptionally effective in promoting digestive harmony, alleviating dry coughs, and soothing throat discomfort.
en.기미 및 귀경: Taste: slightly sweet and bitter. Contraindications: menstruation, pregnancy.
en.조리 방법 요약: Finely grind Macmun-dong and Doraji. Season the pork with a mixture of Macmun-dong, Doraji powder, and seasonings to create the filling, then wrap it in mandu dough.
en.ancient_context: This traditional K-Food recipe is designed to harmonize the properties of ingredients and balance yin and yang energies, promoting overall wellness and vitality.

en.부재료 및 약재: Gogiya (20g), Red Date (30g), Lotus Seed (20g), Salt, Sugar
en.주요 효능: This recipe helps to promote diuresis and relieve bloating, while also supporting postpartum recovery and blood circulation. It boosts vitality and overall well-being.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Neutral and Warm, Sweet in taste. Effects: Liver, Kidney, and Blood Circulation.
en.조리 방법 요약: Cook the pumpkin and mash it. Add cooked red date and lotus seed to the mixture. Adjust the consistency with rice flour and add gogiya for a well-balanced flavor.
en.ancient_context: This traditional K-Food recipe is designed to harmonize the properties of ingredients and prevent adverse reactions. It embodies the principles of balanced nutrition and vitality, aligning with the ancient concept of yangsheng.

en.부재료 및 약재: Jiguzi (Hentgae fruit, 20g), Poria (20g), Garlic, Ginger, Sesame oil
en.주요 효능: Exceptional detoxification and liver protection. It helps to eliminate internal heavy metals and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract discomfort.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Warm, Cooling, Sweet, Pungent. Indications: Liver Qi stagnation, Kidney Qi deficiency, Menstrual irregularities.
en.조리 방법 요약: Sauté Mu, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil in sesame oil. Add Dongtae and Hentgae fruit to the broth and simmer with Daikon radish for a harmonious finish.
en.ancient_context: This Jeolla-do traditional coastal dish utilizes Hentgae fruit to amplify detoxification and liver protection abilities, promoting overall well-being.

en.요리명: Rice Cake Soup with Soy Chicken
en.주재료: Free-range rooster (1 piece), Tteokguk rice cakes (300g)
en.부재료 및 약재: Ginkgo biloba leaves (30g), Angelica sinensis roots (20g), Astragalus membranaceus stems (15g), Korean leek, Korean dates (10g), Garlic, Ginger
en.주요 효능: Balances the stomach and kidneys, strengthens joint cartilage to prevent knee joint pain and nerve numbness, and boosts vitality.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: neutral or warm in nature, sweet and bitter in taste. Effects: kidney, liver, and spleen tonification.
en.조리 방법 요약: Simmer the rooster bones with ginkgo biloba leaves, Angelica sinensis roots, and Astragalus membranaceus stems to create a nourishing broth. Serve with roasted rooster meat and Tteokguk rice cakes.
en.ancient_context: This harmonious soup recipe is designed to eliminate toxins from the body through urination and promote smooth blood circulation, much like a traditional Korean medicine prescription.

en.부재료 및 약재: White Poria (10g), Licorice (5g), Ginseng (10g), Korean Ginseng (15g), Date fruit (10g), Green Onion, Garlic
en.주요 효능: This dish helps to warm the digestive system, increase absorption rates, and boost immunity. It also relieves chronic fatigue and improves overall vitality.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Warm, Sweet. Directions for use: Cold, Heat, Menstruation.
en.조리 방법 요약: Chop the chicken into small pieces and simmer it with Sagunja herbs in a broth made from Taro root. Add Green Onion, Garlic, and Ginger to enhance flavor and aroma.
en.ancient_context: This traditional K-Food recipe is designed to harmonize the properties of ingredients, balance yin and yang energies, and promote overall wellness.

en.부재료 및 약재: Paljin Tang (10g of Sukjihwang, 10g of Danggui, 8g of Baekjak-yak, 6g of Cheonggung, 10g of Insam, 10g of Baekchul, 10g of Boryeong, and 5g of Gamcho), Daechu (15g), and Ginger
en.주요 효능: Balances the body's vital energy and blood circulation to improve overall well-being, postpartum recovery, and menstrual irregularities.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: warm, harmonious, and sweet. Effects: regulates menstruation, nervous system, and respiratory function.
en.조리 방법 요약: Clean the inside of Ogolgye. Add Paljin Tang ingredients to a pouch and simmer with Ogolgye for 2 hours to create a nourishing stew.
en.ancient_context: This harmonious stew recipe is designed to purify the body by eliminating toxins through urination and promoting healthy blood circulation, much like a traditional Korean medicine prescription.

en.요리명: Kudzu Root & Bean Sprout Pollock Soup
en.부재료 및 약재: Ji-gu-ja (20g), Gal-hwa (10g), Mu, Garlic, Sesame oil
en.주요 효능: Rapidly eliminates accumulated acetaldehyde after drinking and protects the stomach lining.
en.기미 및 귀경: Ki-mi: Neutral, sweet, and slightly bitter. Gui-kyung: Stomach-soothing, diuretic, and liver-protective.
en.조리 방법 요약: Simmer the medicine with Ji-gu-ja and Gal-hwa (Kkot-kkot). Add Buk, Kongnamul, and Mu to the sesame oil and cook until it's refreshing.
en.ancient_context: This recipe is a type of nourishing soup that helps to eliminate toxins from the body and promote blood circulation, similar to a traditional Korean medicine prescription.

en.부재료 및 약재: Shiitake mushrooms (30g), Ginger (5g), Garlic, Green Onion, Soy Sauce
en.주요 효능: Promotes urination and diuresis to relieve respiratory congestion, skin irritation, and strengthens muscles.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Neutral or slightly cooling, sweet and pungent. Indications: Cold, fever, and digestive issues.
en.조리 방법 요약: Cook pork and radish in a pot with water, then add sliced ginger and shiitake mushrooms. Season with soy sauce to taste.
en.ancient_context: This stew-like recipe is a type of nourishing food that helps eliminate toxins through urination and promotes healthy blood circulation, similar to the concept of 'Tang-yak' in traditional Korean medicine.

en.부재료 및 약재: Gugija (15g), Muzyum, Cham-gireum, Ma-neul
en.주요 효능: Balances the body's energies, promotes blood circulation and overall well-being by purifying the liver and kidneys, and strengthening cardiovascular health.
en.기미 및 귀경: Melasma: Cool, calm, and soothing. Otoma: Kidney-balancing, nerve-calming, and digestive-soothing.
en.조리 방법 요약: Saute the Guk with Ma-neul and Cham-gireum in a savory oil. Add the Maebyeong and Gugija after cooking, then simmer to completion.
en.ancient_context: This recipe is a type of nourishing soup that helps eliminate toxins through urination and promotes healthy blood flow, much like the traditional Korean medicine practice of 'Tang-yak'.

en.부재료 및 약재: Mugwort (25g), Astragalus (10g), Jujube fruit (15g), Ginger, Garlic
en.주요 효능: This dish combines the revitalizing properties of beef bones with the soothing effects of mugwort to calm dry coughs and soothe a parched throat, while also replenishing bodily fluids.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Cool, Warming, Sweet. Indications: Menstrual irregularities, Digestive issues, Fatigue.
en.조리 방법 요약: Remove excess fat from the beef bones. Simmer the bones with mugwort and astragalus in a pressure cooker until tender, then strain and discard any excess liquid.
en.ancient_context: This nourishing soup is designed to promote the elimination of bodily toxins through urination and maintain healthy blood circulation, much like a traditional Korean medicine prescription.

en.부재료 및 약재: Ussul (Cow's Knee, 30g), Sanggi (20g), Ogaapi (20g), Garlic, Daepa
en.주요 효능: Supplements joint fluid and heals cartilage damage, treating knee and hip pain, as well as symptoms of osteoarthritis.
en.기미 및 귀경: Flavor: Neutral, Bitter, Sour, Sweet. Kidney, Nervous System.
en.조리 방법 요약: Remove the impurities from Dogaani and bones. Combine Ussul, Ogaapi, Sanggi herbs with Dogaani and simmer for a day to create a harmonious balance of yin and yang.
en.ancient_context: This traditional Korean medicine recipe is designed to strengthen knee cartilage, alleviate joint pain, and promote overall balance and harmony in the body.

en.부재료 및 약재: Yakson's bark (50g), Oga pi (30g), Huang qi (30g), Kukkia (20g), Dae choo (15g), Garlic
en.주요 효능: This dish helps to relieve fatigue and stress, soothes the nervous system, and promotes digestive harmony.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Neutral, calming, sweet, and slightly bitter. Indications: Fatigue, stress, digestive issues.
en.조리 방법 요약: Prepare the Ori by cleaning its internal organs. Add Yakson's bark, Oga pi, and Dae choo to a slow-cooked broth for at least 2 hours to create a nourishing Back Stew.
en.ancient_context: This dish is a traditional remedy from the Gyeongsang-do region, designed to relieve joint pain, reduce fever, and improve overall vitality.

en.주재료: Young chicken (1 piece), cooked white rice (50g)
en.부재료 및 약재: Danggui (20g), Ginseng (15g), Date fruit (10g), Astragalus (15g), Garlic (10g)
en.주요 효능: Rapidly replenishes vital energy, nourishes the blood, and soothes fatigue, suitable for postpartum recovery, anemia, and pale complexion.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: warm, sweet, and slightly spicy. Indications: menstruation, menopause, postpartum recovery, and general vitality.
en.조리 방법 요약: Place cooked rice, ginseng, date fruit, garlic in the chicken's cavity. Add danggui, astragalus, and water to a pot, then simmer for 1 hour 30 minutes.
en.ancient_context: This traditional three-element soup harmonizes the vital energy, brightens the complexion, and improves circulation and blood flow.

en.부재료 및 약재: Ginseng (12g), Licorice root (5g), Ophiopogon, Soybean sprouts, Garlic, Gochugaru, Sesame oil
en.주요 효능: This dish helps to release pent-up energy and soothe the body's heat, alleviating chronic headaches and chest tightness.

en.조리 방법 요약: Simmer the beef in a broth made with ginseng and licorice root. Then, sauté the Korean leek and vegetables with gochugaru and sesame oil, adding the cooked beef and medicinal soup to create a harmonious blend.
en.ancient_context: This traditional K-Food recipe is designed to enhance the synergy between ingredients and balance the body's energies according to the principles of Eastern medicine.

en.부재료 및 약재: Gugija fruit (20g), leek, garlic, soy sauce, parsley

en.ancient_context: This traditional K-Food recipe is designed to harmonize the properties of ingredients and promote balance in the body, aligning with the principles of Eastern medicine.

en.ancient_context: This recipe is a type of nourishing soup that helps to eliminate toxins through urination and promote blood circulation, similar to the traditional method of decoction.

en.ancient_context: This soup is a type of nourishing dish that helps to eliminate toxins from the body and promote smooth blood circulation, much like a traditional Korean medicine prescription.

en.부재료 및 약재: Ginseng (25g), Sesame Oil, Minced Garlic, Soy Sauce

en.ancient_context: This nourishing soup recipe is designed to eliminate toxins from the body and promote healthy blood circulation, much like a traditional Korean medicine prescription.

en.부재료 및 약재: Herbal Blend (15g of Rehmannia, 15g of Danggui, 10g of Baekjak, and 8g of Cheonggung), Korean Red Pepper (5g), Garlic, Soy Sauce, Sugar

en.부재료 및 약재: Danggui (15g), soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, water

en.부재료 및 약재: Dandelion root (3g), Licorice root (1g), Dried Platycodon leaves (1g)

en.기미 및 귀경: Taste: slightly sweet and bitter. Effect: calming and soothing.
en.조리 방법 요약: Steep Dandelion root, Licorice root, and Platycodon leaves in warm water to create a refreshing and balancing tea.

en.부재료 및 약재: Water (1L)
en.주요효능: This tonic helps to warm the stomach after meals, assists digestion, and promotes overall well-being by balancing body heat and flavor.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Warm, Sweet, and Bitter. Effects: Soothing, Harmonizing.
en.조리 방법 요약: Boil ginseng in water until the desired flavor is achieved, then serve.

en.부재료 및 약재: Turmeric (10g), Jujube (5g), Bitter Melon, Shiitake Mushroom, Green Onion
en.주요효능: The combination of turmeric's vitality-boosting properties and doenjang's digestive benefits helps to improve chronic fatigue and alleviate digestive issues.
en.기미 및 귀경: Ki: Warmth (), Sweetness (), Saltness (). Gui: Earthy, Digestive.
en.조리 방법 요약: Brew the turmeric tea, then add the doenjang to make a savory broth, and finally add tofu, mushrooms, bitter melon, and green onion. Simmer until the flavors meld together.

en.부재료 및 약재: Ginseng (10g), Gochujang (40g), Potato, Zucchini, Green onion, Garlic
en.주요효능: The digestive benefits of ginseng and the spicy-sweet flavor of gochujang harmonize to warm the stomach and aid digestion.
en.기미 및 귀경: Characteristics: Warm, sour, and sweet. Suitable for those seeking balance and harmony in their digestive system.
en.조리 방법 요약: Cook pork and gochujang in a pot, add ginseng broth, mushrooms, and potatoes, then simmer until the ingredients are fully cooked.

en.요리명: Chinese Yam & Pollock Bean Curd Stew
en.부재료 및 약재: Ginseng (15g), Kimchi, Garlic, Ginger, Red Pepper Flakes
en.주요효능: This dish helps to maintain overall well-being and bone health by combining the protein-rich Korean Beech Leaves with the rich flavor of cod. The ginseng adds a boost of vitality.
en.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Neutral, Sweet. Nourishing, Balancing.
en.조리 방법 요약: Cook kimchi and cod in a pot until it's well combined, then add Korean Beech Leaves and ginseng powder to create a harmonious and nourishing stew.

ja.요리명: 体に優しい日常の wellness（Desu）
ja.부재료 및 약재:
|
ダルコイド根（50g）、黒大豆（30g）、シスカンドラberry（20g）、黒 sesame（20g）、 Ginger（20g）
ja.주요 효능:
|
血流促進と活力を促進し、老廃防止、髪質改善に効果的で、疲労、乾燥目の症状、消化器系の問題を軽減する。また、体のエネルギーバランスを整え、全体的な健康を促進します。
ja.기미 및 귀경: 温性, 平性, 脾経, 胃経, 肝経, 腎経
ja.조리 방법 요약:
|
米、黒大豆、シスカンドラberry、 Ginger を水に浸けます。ダルコイド根と Ginger が煮たものを作ります。
ja.ancient_context:
|
この伝統的なレシピは、体のエネルギーバランスを整え、全体的な健康を促進するための和みの組み合わせを通じて原理に基づいています。

ja.요리명: 体に優しい紅 Dates Spaghetti
ja.부재료 및 약재: Ginseng (20g), Shrimp (50g), Onion, Garlic, White Wine, Sour Cream, Olive Oil
ja.주요 효능: 体に優しい紅 Dates Spaghetti
ja.기미 및 귀경: 温性, 酸味, 肝経, 腎経
ja.조리 방법 요약: 体に優しい紅 Dates Spaghetti
ja.ancient_context: 伝統的な東洋医学調理システムに合わせて食材間の弱さ相乗効果を高め、相極を防ぐように設計された本格的なK-Food保養食です。

ja.주재료: パッタ(250g), ミルガール(200g)
ja.부재료 및 약재: マガール(10g), フコウレンガール(10g), シオム, セトゥ
ja.주요 효능: 水液の流れを活発化して潤瘀と各器病を治療。心臓を保養し、熱を除去します.
ja.기미 및 귀경: 気味: 平性や涼性、甘味及び酸味。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 밀걸에 마가르와 후코우렌걸을 섞어 면을 만듭니다.ゆでパッタをろ過し、パタルクスを作り、煮て面を煮ます。
ja.ancient_context: 伝統的 食治 理論に基づいて、マ・福パッタルクスに含まれる薬材の胃袋保護機能と気力回復を目指した古典食生活処方です.

ja.요리명: サグンジャ ヤクセンジュク
ja.주재료: メップシル(150g), チャプシル(50g)
ja.부재료 및 약재: インサム(10g), ハクトウ(10g), コキング(10g), カンショ(5g), タツ(10g)
ja.주요 효능: 体に優しい気運を高くして、消化不良、食欲不振、慢性便意を治し、全身の気力を回復します。
ja.기미 및 귀경: 気味：温性＆平性、甘味。 耳鏡：非経、胃経、폐경。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 사궁자 야쿠센쥬쿠를 준비하고 불린 실에 약물을 넣고 대타츠와 함께 부드럽게 끓여 죽을 때까지 먹습니다.
ja.ancient_context: 몸에 상냥한 기운이 있고, 식욕이 있으면서도 기력이 다하고 있었을 경우, 조제해 마시는 전통의 보양죽입니다.

ja.부재료 및 약재: cinnamon bark (30g)， Ginseng (15g)， Jujube (20g)， Schisandra (15g)， Date (30g)
ja.주요 효능: この料理は、体を強化し、体温を調節し、免疫システムを強化するのに役立ち、疲労とストレスを軽減します。
ja.기미 및 귀경: 温性, 脾経, 腎経, 肺経
ja.조리 방법 요약: cinnamon bark の浸出液を作り、炊いた米と Ginseng 、 Jujube 、 schisandra 、 Date を混ぜ合わせて、味のバランスを整えます。
ja.ancient_context: この秋/冬の伝統的な料理は、体を強化し、皮膚のバリアを強化するのに役立ち、体温を調節し、疲労を軽減します。

ja.부재료 및 약재: マクムンドン(25g)、オオカツ(ファンジョン、15g)、シイタケ(30g)
ja.주요 효능: 체내의 림프액을 조정하여 입안 건조, 말린 한숨을 진정시켜 체온을 낮춥니다.
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：寒性、平性、甘味、高味。 耳鏡：閉経、肝経、心経
ja.조리 방법 요약: マクムンドンとトングレを軽く煎じて水を出す。 米と大麦、しいたけのスライスを安置し、薬水でご飯を作る。
ja.ancient_context: 몸의 열을 낮추고, 림프액을 생성하고, 갈레와 기침을 진정시키고, 신체의 조화를 유지하는 구황 요리입니다.

ja.부재료 및 약재: 山藥（ま、40g）、大樸子（10g）、小塩
ja.주요 효능: 간과肺를 유지하고 습기를 제거하여 대변을 멈추고 관절의 붓기와 통증을 진정시킬 수 있습니다.
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ: 平性及び温性、甘味及び淡味。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 藥は先に茹で置き、茹でした山藥と米を煮立て、大樸子と小塩を加え、濃縮するまで煮る。
ja.ancient_context: 간을 강하게하고 체내의 습기를 제거하여 膝関節の腫れや痛みを治す補養式です。

ja.부재료 및 약재: 白髪（乾燥、20g）、大豆（15g）、蜂蜜（20g）
ja.주요 효능: 子音湯法（肺をしっとりさせる）作用と安神（心安定）効果で不眠症、神經不安、乾いた咳を改善する。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ: 平性または凉性、甘味および苦味。耳鏡：閉経、心鏡、胃鏡。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 白髪ともち米を水に呼ぶ。 大豆と一緒に鍋に入れてゆっくり煮てお粥が出来上がったら蜂蜜を混ぜる。
ja.ancient_context: 心を安定させ、安神して不眠症や気管支乾燥を治療する子音湯法料理です。

ja.부재료 및 약재: 人参(20g)、連子肉(連花種、30g)、榎木(10g)、大樸子(15g)、醤油
ja.주요 효능: 秘訣の気運を見て、腎臓と心臓を治めて下痢を止め、不安定な心身と油井を治療する。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：温性、甘味、澀味。耳鏡：鼻鏡、神経、心鏡。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 豬肉は醤油に軽く眠くて一口サイズに切る。 連子肉は煮て皮をむく。鍋に米とすべての材料をのせてご飯を作る。
ja.ancient_context: 朝鮮王室で楽しんでいたボヤンシクで、秘訣を見て心身を安心させる宮中薬船です。

ja.부재료 및 약재: 天宮（8g）、唐桂（12g）、愛パン、ジャガイモ、大破、マネール
ja.주요 효능: 血液循環を促進し、血液を補強し(保血活血)、月経不調、頭痛及び全身の血管症状を緩和します。
ja.기미 및 귀경: 気味：温性、辛味及び甘味。 耳経：間経、神経、心경。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 糖桂と天宮を煎じ、スープと混ぜる。 小麦粉を薬水で練って熟成した後、野菜のスープが沸騰したときに自家製費を取り除く。
ja.ancient_context: 血液循環を促進し、皮を補強する(保血活血)代表的な伝統薬理手作ビ料理です。

ja.주재료: 饅頭皮（小麦粉、複霊粉20g）、豬肉（150g）
ja.부재료 및 약재: 豬肉芋頭（100g）、ネギ、豆腐、宿主のハーブ、ニンニク、生姜
ja.주요 효능: 脾臓を健康にし、利尿作用を通じて体の浮腫を抜いて糖尿の予防を助ける。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：平性と涼しさ、甘味（甘味）と淡味（淡味）。耳鏡：鼻経、胃鏡、神経、小腸鏡。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 小麦粉に複霊粉を混ぜて饅頭皮を借りる。饅頭所で刻んだ豬肉、豬肉芋頭、ネギ、豆腐を混ぜて饅頭を借りて蒸す。
ja.ancient_citation: フードディミバン（Eumsik Dimibang、1670）
ja.ancient_context: 脾臓を健康にし、利尿作用を通じて体の浮腫を抜いて糖尿の予防を助ける伝統饅頭式です。

ja.부재료 및 약재: Kudzu (30g), Red dates (20g), Jujube (15g)
ja.주요 효능: This dish helps to regulate blood pressure and improve eyesight, relieves joint pain and improves skin tone.
ja.기미 및 귀경: Properties: Neutral in nature, sweet in flavor. Effects: Regulates the liver and kidneys, promotes overall well-being.
ja.조리 방법 요약: Rinse kudzu lightly. Combine brown rice, glutinous rice, cooked red dates, and add kudzu on top to cook in a pressure cooker.
ja.ancient_context: This longevity-promoting porridge helps to regulate the liver and kidneys, and soothes the back and knees.

ja.요리명: 体に優しい gentle daily wellness (Desu)
ja.주재료:
|
体に優しい gentle daily wellness (Desu)
ja.부재료 및 약재:
|
体に優しい gentle daily wellness (Desu)
ja.주요 효능:
|
体に優しい gentle daily wellness (Desu)
ja.기미 및 귀경: 温性, 平性, 酸味, 肝経, 肺経, 心経
ja.조리 방법 요약:
|
体に優しい gentle daily wellness (Desu)
ja.ancient_context:
|
体に優しい gentle daily wellness (Desu)

ja.부재료 및 약재: 三七根粉（5g）、黒豆（20g）、大樸子（10g）
ja.주요 효능: 体内の血液循環を調整し、微小出血を防止し、傷口を回復させる効果があります。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ: 温性、甘味、苦味。耳鏡: 腔経、胃経、大腸経。
ja.조리 방법 요약: キビと米、呼ばれた黒豆を均等に混ぜる。ご飯を合わせて三七根粉を水にほぐし、固くご飯を炊く。
ja.ancient_context: 体内の血液循環を調整し、微小出血を防止し、傷口を回復させる伝統の治療法です。

ja.요리명: 体に優しい白牡丹そばのスープ
ja.주재료: 白牡丹そば（200g）、 Soy Sauce Broth
ja.부재료 및 약재: 白牡丹根（15g）、 Licorice Root（5g）、 Cucumber、 Ginger Juice、 Wasabi、 Ginkgo Powder
ja.주요 효능: 消化器をリラックスさせ、腹部の痛みや内熱を和らげます。
ja.기미 및 귀경: 涼性, 酸味, 脾経, 肝経
ja.조리 방법 요약: 白牡丹根と Licorice Root を Soy Sauce Broth に煮込み、そばを炊き上げ、 savory ボウスと cucumber の garnish を添えてサービスします。
ja.ancient_context: 伝統的な栄養豊かなそばのスープは消化器のエネルギーを和らげ、腹部の痛みや内熱を和らげます。

ja.요리명:
体に優しい和風の総合栄養バランスのPorridgeです。身体を整え、心地よい体験をお楽しみください。

(Translation: This is a harmonious vitality porridge that provides comprehensive nutrition balance for your body and mind. Enjoy a pleasant experience.)
ja.주재료: ご飯（100グラム）と黒砂糖（50グラム）
ja.부재료 및 약재: Ginseng（20g）, 朱元湯（10g）, 砂糖
ja.주요 효능: 体に優しい食品は、骨・関節の健康をサポートし、脳機能を促進するとともに、乾燥による便秘を予防します。
ja.기미 및 귀경: 平性、肝硬変、神経
ja.조리 방법 요약: Ginsengの浸出液を抜き、米と黒砂糖を粉砕器で粉にし、その上に浸出液を加えゆっくりと煮込む。
ja.ancient_context: この長寿促進型の粥は、骨健康をサポートし、消化器を栄養豊かにします。老化を防ぎます。

ja.요리명: 体に優しい、身体にやさしい、健康のためのパティバップです。
ja.주재료: ご飯（300グラム），パティ（50グラム）
ja.부재료 및 약재:
体に優しい、身体に良い、健康的な食事を楽しむために、ご褒美の時間を過ごすことをお勧めします。この日は、体を温め、心を落ち着かせるための、適度な運動と、バランスの取れた食事をお勧めします。

ご褒美の時間には、以下の料理を試してみてください：

1. Gogiya (25g): 素朴で健康的な味わいが特徴です。この野菜は、体を温めるのに適しています。
2. Daecheong (15g): これは、身体に優しい、栄養価の高い食材です。この野菜は、心地よい食感と豊かな味わいを持っています。

これらの料理は、あなたの日頃の生活をより良いものにするために、適切な量で摂取することで、体に優しく、身体に良い効果が期待できます。
ja.주요 효능: 体に優しいバランスを保つ、 Vital Energyを補給し、疲れと浮腫みの予防に役立ちます。
ja.기미 및 귀경: 平性、肝硬変、神経、心鏡
ja.조리 방법 요약: パチは少し柔らかく焼いた後、ギョージヤとダッチェONGを混ぜて、ご飯に並べて作られます。健康的でリフレッシュする料理です。
ja.ancient_context: この伝統的なレシピは、传统医学の原理に基づいており、消化器健康と全体的な健康を向上させるためのゴジヤとパットの利点を強調しています。

ja.부재료 및 약재: 用安肉(15g), 白仁(10g), 蜂蜜
ja.주요 효능: 調整心臓と肝臓をして、不眠症、胸が痛くなることを和らげ、毛髪と腸内膜を調整することにより体の調和を実現します.
ja.기미 및 귀경: 気味：平性と温性、甘味。 耳鏡：心経、肝経、鼻経。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 黒芝と炙したもち米をよく混ぜる。用安肉に加えた水で材料を煮て、徐々に煮上げ松と蜂蜜で締めることにする。
ja.ancient_context: 伝統食理理論に基づいて、黑豆安心竹に含まれる薬剤の胃腸粘膜保護機能と気力回復を図った古典食生活処方です。

ja.요리명: バランスのとれた和え物菓子
ja.주재료: 米粉（150グラム）、小麦粉（100グラム）
ja.부재료 및 약재: Ginseng 20グラム、アヒル、干し海藻、パチュリ、ポテト、ブロッコリー
ja.주요 효능: この料理は排尿と便の動きを促進し、消化器の健康を維持しながら便秘を防ぎます。
ja.기미 및 귀경: 平性、脾経、胃経、心鏡
ja.조리 방법 요약: 米粉、小麦粉、干しきんしょくの粉末を混ぜて Dough を作ります。その Dough に鰻節、干し海苔、野菜、餅を煮込んだ broth を加えて simmer します。
ja.ancient_context: この伝統的なレシピは、传统医学の原理に基づいており、原材料が消化器系に保護効果をもたらし、活力を促進する能力があることを強調しています。

ja.부재료 및 약재: 白出(15g)、感草(5g)、ウコン粉(2g)、大樸子(10g)
ja.주요 효능: 體内の慢性便秘を除去し、腸管の消化効率を高めることで、慢性便秘や腹部膨満を軽減します。
ja.기미 및 귀경: 気味：温性、甘味、高味。 耳鏡：非経、上経。
ja.조리 방법 요약: じゃがいもを履いて翁心をお世話になります。 白出と感草を煎じ、ご飯を出してウコンパウダーと翁心をのせてご飯を安らぐ。
ja.ancient_context: 伝統食理理論に基づき、白出感草翁心飯に含まれる薬剤の胃腸粘膜保護機能と気力回復を図った古典食生活処方です。

ja.조리 방법 요약: 野菜油にわかめとムール貝を炒める。水を注ぎ、沸騰した後、交換したユルムジュプを入れて中火で30分間ムングンに煮る。
ja.ancient_context: 体内の毒素を尿で排出し、血行をスムーズに治めるために湯薬月のようにゆっくり煮込んだスープ系の養生料理です。

ja.요리명: モノの血まみれの尾くま湯
ja.부재료 및 약재: 唐鬼(15g)、熟脂黄(15g)、伯爵薬(10g)、天弓(8g)、ナツメ(15g)
ja.주요 효능: 気血が極端に壊れているとき、補血を優先して骨の健康を強くし、慢性疲労や虚熱を治す。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：温性、平性、甘味、甘味。耳鏡：肝硬変、神経、心鏡。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 小尻はピットを十分に差し引いた。尾と物の薬剤を鍋に盛り、薬火で長時間孤児真っ白なスープが出たらネギを振りかける。
ja.ancient_context: 体内の毒素を尿で排出し、血行をスムーズに治めるために湯薬月のようにゆっくり煮込んだスープ系の養生料理です。

ja.요리명: ポゴニョン清熱解毒局
ja.부재료 및 약재: ポゴニョン（タンポポ、20g）、味噌（大さじ2杯）、ネギ、ニンニク
ja.주요 효능: 肝臓の劣性炎症（黄疸、胃炎）を沈め、体内沸騰および毒素を浄化する清熱解毒剤の役割。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：寒性または涼しさ、苦味、甘味。耳鏡：肝硬、胃鏡。
ja.조리 방법 요약: ポゴニョンを煮て解毒水を作る。鍋に薬水を入れて味噌をゆでた後、アウクと干し海老を入れてじっくり煮る。
ja.ancient_context: タンポポの強力な消炎作用を活用して、肝臓と胃の炎症を治す解毒局です。

ja.부재료 및 약재: Jinpi (Citrus peel, 15g), Doenjang (2 large spoons), Tabbogobyeot, Manul
ja.주요 효능: This dish helps to relieve constipation and promote digestion by stimulating the intestines and eliminating gas. It also soothes stomach discomfort, nausea, and bloating.
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ: On-seong (), Sseum-mal (bitter taste) and Ma-eun-mal ().耳径：Bi-kyeong、Wi-kyeong、Pae-kyeong。
ja.조리 방법 요약: Siraegi is cooked in doenjang. Jinpi (Citrus peel) is added to a warm medicine with siraegi and tabbogobyeot, then simmered to make the soup.
ja.ancient_context: This is a traditional recipe that helps to eliminate gas and promote digestion by stimulating the intestines. It's a gentle and soothing dish for daily wellness.

ja.요리명: 龍安肉アンシンカルビタン
ja.부재료 및 약재: 龍眼肉（20g）、ナツメ（15g）、松の実（10g）、ナツメ、ニンニク
ja.주요 효능: 心臓を滲み、痙攣をしっかりして睡眠障害、記憶力の減退、ストレス胸のドキドキを解消する。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ: 温性(溫性)、甘味(甘味)。耳鏡：心鏡、非経。
ja.조리 방법 요약: リブはピットを抜いて沸騰したお湯にさらす。肋骨と龍眼肉、ナツメを釜に入れて薬火で長時間孤児澄んで肋湯を煮る。
ja.ancient_context: 体内の毒素を尿で排出し、血行をスムーズに治めるために湯薬月のようにゆっくり煮込んだスープ系の養生料理です。

ja.부재료 및 약재: Dried Korean radish (30g), Garlic, Ginger, Gochujang, Doenjang
ja.주요 효능: This soup helps to eliminate internal toxins through urine and sweat, relieving thirst and treating hangover-induced digestive issues.
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ: Neutral or slightly cool in nature, with a sweet and slightly bitter taste.耳径: Cold, warm, and heat properties.
ja.조리 방법 요약: Boil the Korean radish to make a clear decoction. Add Doenjang and Gochujang to the decoction, then add Ginseng, Burdock root, and Garlic, and simmer until it's slightly thickened.
ja.ancient_context: This Korean Radish and Ginseng Soup is a harmonious blend of the cooling properties of Korean radish and the iron-rich properties of Ginseng, working together to treat hangover-induced digestive issues.

ja.주재료: 豚牛骨(400g), さつま芋, にんにく
ja.부재료 및 약재: ササム(デドク, 30g), ごちゅうがら, かんじょう, まな, せいこうちょう
ja.주요 효능: インフルエンザ, 気管支喘息症状を補完し、消化器を保護し、全身免疫機構を強化します。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ:少し涼しさ、甘味および苦味。耳鏡：閉経、胃鏡。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 牛骨とにんにく, さつま芋を漬物に漬める。鍋に牛骨を入れてササム(ササム)を切って上に置き、水を加えて煮立てます。
ja.ancient_context: ササムの免疫活性成分と豚牛骨の自音成分を融合した忠清道山間の名物調理です。

ja.주재료: モシジョーゲー(300g), ブチュウ(30g)
ja.부재료 및 약재: 結明子(15g), チェヨゴチ(1個), マネール, タイパー, テンイルリョム
ja.주요 효능: 肝臓を下げ、目の疲れや乾燥を減らし、貝のタウリン成分で肝臓の解毒や疲労回復を助けます。
ja.기미 Ext: シミ: 涼しさ、苦味(苦味)および含味(鹹味)。耳鏡：肝鏡、大腸鏡。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 結明子をつけて薬水をろ過する。鍋に薬水を注ぎ、モシジョーゲーとマネールを煮る。
ja.ancient_context: 体内の毒素を尿で排出し、血行をスムーズに治めるために湯薬月のようにゆっくり煮込んだスープ系の養生料理です。

ja.요리명: キリョク カンショ ドラジタン
ja.부재료 및 약재: キリョク(ドラジ, 25g), カンショ(10g), タイパ, マネール, ソウミン
ja.주요 효능: ふえのつおりをあけ、せっくをすすみきゅうをじょうじしむと、きちんをじょうじしむ。また、もくぐもうのぶぞうをがらあかす。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ: へいせい(平性)、くさいみ(苦味)及びからみ(辛味)及びあまみ(甘味)。帰経：ふえきょう、いきょう。
ja.조리 방법 요약: キリョク(ドラジ)とカンショをくびにしまう。ニャッコギとともにみずをかけて、ふくくりあがってがらきちんじょうじしむようになる。
ja.ancient_context: 体内の毒素を尿で排出し、血行をスムーズに治めるために湯薬月のようにゆっくり煮込んだスープ系の養生料理です。

ja.부재료 및 약재: 茶電子（ギルギョンギョンギさん、15g）、バイオ油、ニンニク
ja.주요 효능: 尿道や泌尿器系の熱を冷やして尿のコミュニケーションを助け、全身浮腫や水分低体症状を解消する。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：涼しさ、甘味（甘味）、淡味（淡味）。耳鏡：腎臓鏡、膀胱鏡、肝硬変、閉経。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 車をポケットに入れて30分間煮て薬水を出す。麦油にわかめを炒め、貝と薬水を注ぎ、わかめを煮る。
ja.ancient_context: 体内の毒素を尿で排出し、血行をスムーズに治めるために湯薬月のようにゆっくり煮込んだスープ系の養生料理です。

ja.부재료 및 약재: Guki-ja (20g), Dasi-ma (10g), Deulg-i-eum, Da-jin Ma-neul, Pa, Deul-kkae-garu
ja.주요 효능: Mu and Guki-ja harmonize the body's energy, promote digestion, and increase appetite. This dish is a gentle and soothing food that helps to balance one's constitution.
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ: Seong-seong (平性) and Soo-neul-ham (涼しさ), Gam-mat (甘味) and Ham-mat (鹹味).耳径：Bi-kyeong、Wi-kyeong、Gan-kyeong、Shin-kyeong。
ja.조리 방법 요약: Chae the Mu. Cook the Mu with Deulg-i-eum, Ma-neul, and Guki-ja in a broth made with Dasi-ma and Guk. Simmer until the Mu is tender.
ja.ancient_context: This traditional Korean side dish is based on the principles of harmony between the five flavors and the balance of yin and yang. It is a gentle and soothing food that helps to promote digestion and overall well-being.

ja.부재료 및 약재: サムムタン（スクジファン15g、ダンギ15g、伯爵薬10g、天弓8g）、シナモン（5g）、ニンニク、醤油、砂糖
ja.주요 효능: コラーゲンとサムトタンの補血作用が出会い、皮膚の障壁を丈夫にし、関節膜の利益と血液循環障害の予防。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：温性と平性、甘味、甘味（鹹味）。耳鏡：肝硬変、神経、心鏡。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 足足を沸騰したお湯に秒丼煮る。圧力鍋に足足、物事薬材ポケット、醤油、砂糖を入れて肉が柔らかくなるまで眠くする。
ja.ancient_context: 伝統的な東洋医学調理システムに合わせて食材間の弱さ相乗効果を高め、相極を防ぐように設計された本格的なK-Food保養食です。

ja.부재료 및 약재: 山藥（マルガル、15g）、果子（15g）、大樺（10g）、味噌（1大さじ）、麦油
ja.주요 효능: 體を健康に保し、食欲を高めることで大腸環境を改善し疲劳を解消.
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ: 平性または溫性、甘味。耳径：非経、上経、大腸経。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 無塵地は水で洗って塩味を引く。味噌と麦わら油に無塵地を混ぜて、アンチョビのスープ、山藥粉、果子と眠くする。
ja.ancient_context: 韓国方五味調和に基づき、半上で薬効の相互作用と消化率を高めるように加工した伝統的な保存式ハーブのおかずです。

ja.요리명: マネールのダンジー・ジャンアッチ
ja.부재료 및 약재: ダンジー（15g）、醤油、酢、砂糖、水
ja.주요 효능: 血を補充し、凝集した血流をほぐし（活血）、暖かいマネールの性質が石鹸を温めて水族冷症の緩和。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：温性、辛味（辛味）、甘味（甘味）。耳鏡：肝硬変、心鏡、胃鏡。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 醤油、酢、砂糖、水にダンジーを入れて煎じ、漬物を作る。一口サイズでサンマネールに熱い漬物を注ぐ。
ja.ancient_citation: フードディミバン（Eumsik Dimibang、1670）
ja.ancient_context: マネールの胃腸保温効能とダンジーの活血効能が浸透圧漬法により融合された伝統的なうなぎです。

ja.요리명: ゴール減算苦味ハーブ
ja.부재료 및 약재: サンサ（10g）、コチュジャン、ニンニク、酢、オリゴ糖、ゴマ塩
ja.주요 효능: 心臓の過度の熱を下げ、消化管消化分泌液を増やし、消化器の輻輳を解決し、魚血除去。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：涼しく、平性、苦味、酸味。耳鏡：心鏡、肝硬、胃鏡。
ja.조리 방법 요약: ゴドロ抜きを沸騰水に浸して苦味を調節する。山砂の果肉を固めて調味料のコチュジャンに混ぜてゴドゥル抜きを混ぜる。
ja.ancient_context: 心臓の火気を下げて胃液の分泌を増やし、春の味を引き立てる代表的な英南地方の高調理でおかずです。

ja.부재료 및 약재: 山茶根(25g)、甘草(5g)、通麻、大葉、醴間醬、糖
ja.주요 효능: 牛肉の蛋白質保養成分と山茶の強力な肉類消化促進機序が結合し、胃腸を助け血行を助けます。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：やや穏やかな、平性、酸味、酸味、甘味。耳鏡：胃鏡、鼻経、肝硬。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 肉はピットを抜いて塊目煮る。 醴間醬味付けに煮た肉と山茶果肉、ニンニクを入れて煮て肉を裂く。
ja.ancient_context: 肉消化剤である山茶果実を長煮に入れて、生態肉のタンパク質吸収を最大化した京畿道陪nobles'保養食です。

ja.부재료 및 약재: 下水（30g）、グギジャ（15g）、醤油、チョチョン、ゴマ
ja.주요 효능: 肝臓と腎臓の機能を補うことで老化を遅らせ、髪の再生と骨密度の弱化を和らげます。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：平性、温性、甘味、澀味。耳鏡：肝硬変、神経、非経口。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 黒豆は呼ばれる。下水達達の水に呼ばれた豆と醤油を入れて調理する。
ja.ancient_context: 江原道清浄霜泰太と滴下水汚れを調えて老化を防ぎ、視力を澄んで維持させる長寿のおかずです。

ja.부재료 및 약재: ヤギ（マルガル、15g）、麦油、塩、ゴマ
ja.주요 효능: 鼻胃消化粘膜をしっかり保護し、下痢を治し、腎臓の栄養を満たす非乾式保養のおかず。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：平性、甘味、甘味。耳鏡：鼻経、胃鏡、閉経、神経。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 豆腐は潰して水気を絞った。茹でたトッと豆腐、艶出し粉、塩油、塩を入れて香ばしく造物造物を切り出す。
ja.ancient_context: 漢方の味味五味調和に基づき、半上から薬効の相互作用と消化率を高めるように加工した伝統的な保存式ハーブのおかずです。

ja.요리명: やっと肉の煮込み炒め
ja.부재료 및 약재: 上記の生（かろうじ、15g）、ニンニク、大根、野菜油、実塩
ja.주요 효능: ガンシンを補強して下半身膝関節を丈夫にし、湿気のある痛みやスリムを消去するのに有益。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：平性、甘味、甘味。耳鏡：肝硬変、神経。
ja.조리 방법 요약: ヌタリは破れ、沸騰したお湯にさらされる。上記生（やっと肉）粉を用意し、キノコを持ち上げ油に炒めるとき一緒に入れてムチンダ。
ja.ancient_context: 漢方の味味五味調和に基づき、半上から薬効の相互作用と消化率を高めるように加工した伝統的な保存式ハーブのおかずです。

ja.부재료 및 약재: グギ粉（5g）、塩油、みじん切りニンニク、塩
ja.주요 효능: 胃を健康に治癒し、消化不良や食欲を促進し、サポニンとタンパク質が免疫活性を高めます。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：平性、辛味（辛味）、苦味（苦味）。耳鏡：秘経、胃鏡、肝硬。
ja.조리 방법 요약: トゥルは、つけて冷水で洗う。卵のジダンを切り、タマネギとグギザ粉、ニンニク、ドキドキを入れて殺す。
ja.ancient_context: 漢方の味味五味調和に基づき、半上から薬効の相互作用と消化率を高めるように加工した伝統的な保存式ハーブのおかずです。

ja.요리명: タルエ ボヒョルサンチャ
ja.부재료 및 약재: タンキュウ(5g), コチュンガル, シャコー, マネール, ケア
ja.주요 효능: 타르에의 또 다른 맛 기운이 비비를 없애고 탄큐의 보혈 작용이 조선생생통과 혈액 정체를 완성한다.
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：おんせい（溫性）、またる味（辛味）、かんみ（甘味）。耳鏡：かんけい、いけい、しむけい。
ja.조리 방법 요약: タルエを はんにつくります。タンキュウうりん みずを シャコーと やねみに せっくして やねみじょうを 作成し、タルエと オイを すこし ぶむ.
ja.ancient_context: 漢方の味味五味調和に基づき、半上から薬効の相互作用と消化率を高めるように加工した伝統的な保存式ハーブのおかずです。

ja.부재료 및 약재: 甘草(5g), doenjang, gochujang, cham-gireum, maenul
ja.주요 효능: 体に優しい風習の毒性を排除し、気管支を外部微細粉塵から防護し、抗炎作用を示す.
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：やや穏やかで、辛味（辛味）、甘味（甘味）。耳鏡：膀胱鏡、肝鏡、閉経。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 風風菜は無理な茎をはずして茹でる。甘草を煮て味噌に軽く混ぜ、味噌味付けでハーブを和らげる。
ja.ancient_context: 몸에 상냥한 풍습의 독성을 배제하고, 미세 분진 등의 유해 가스를 방호하는 고급 조리서에 수록된 웰빙 나물입니다.

ja.부재료 및 약재: ウスル（20g）、醤油、水飴、ニンニク、ドキドキ、ゴマ
ja.주요 효능: 下半身の腰痛や関節軟骨を硬くし、止血や魚血解消作用を促進して血液循環を活性化する。
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ：平性、酸味、甘味。耳鏡：肝硬変、神経、胃鏡。
ja.조리 방법 요약: 宇宙を煎じて私たちは赤い薬水をろ過する。レンコンを切って薬水と醤油を注ぎ、水飴と一緒に煮込んで仕上げる。
ja.ancient_context: 蓮根の止血効果と牛の下半身強化作用を融合して骨の健康をしっか​​りと治す湖南半分のおかずです。

ja.부재료 및 약재: Jin Pi-garu(3g), Ganjang, Pa, Ma-neul, Deulgireum
ja.주요 효능: The combined effects of Kari's cooling property and Dora Ji's digestive function help to eliminate waste in the body.
ja.기미 및 귀경: シミ: Cool, calm, and slightly bitter.耳径: Menstruation, constipation, and stomach discomfort.
ja.조리 방법 요약: Kari is cut into small pieces. The combination of Dora Ji's bitter taste and Kari, Jin Pi-garu, and seasonings is cooked with sesame oil.
ja.ancient_context: This traditional preserved vegetable dish is based on the harmony of the five flavors in Korean medicine and aims to enhance the effects of ingredients and improve digestion.

ja.주재료: タンポポ葉（ポゴニョン、150g）
